stories.title: The Father She Never Knew
stories.body: Adopted at birth, Maria spent forty years wondering. Sheri found her biological father — still living, still in the same town she'd been born in. They met for coffee three weeks later.

stories.title: Six Generations, Bound in Leather
stories.body: The Hendersons commissioned a legacy report for their parents' 50th anniversary. Sheri delivered a hand-bound book tracing six generations — including a great-great-grandfather no one had ever heard about.

stories.title: Reading the Match List
stories.body: Tom's AncestryDNA results showed a close match he didn't recognize. Sheri walked him through the data and helped him understand what it meant — gently, and over the time he needed.

stories.title: A Brother in Ohio
stories.body: Diane had been told for years that her mother only had one child. The DNA said otherwise. Sheri followed the trail — and found a half-brother, eight years older, who'd been searching for her too.

stories.title: The Pattern Made Sense
stories.body: Three generations of estranged fathers. After our research and a coaching series, James understood what he was inheriting — and made the choice to break the cycle for his own son.

stories.title: Half-Siblings, Coast to Coast
stories.body: Donor-conceived and curious, Rachel asked Sheri to help her find biological half-siblings. There were seven. They've started a group chat and meet every summer.
